_comment: v10 Phase A.1 source-cycle table. One row per cited standard listing the publishing body, the current edition, the cycle in years, the next-expected release date (best estimate), and a free-access URL. Used by scripts/check-citation-freshness.mjs to flag manifests whose 'edition' string is more than one cycle behind the current publication of that standard. spec-v22 CF-03: when 'next_expected' is in the past, the row must carry a 'last_verified' (ISO date >= next_expected) re-stamp -- the 'verified, not yet released' acknowledgement -- or the freshness gate fails. Update on each rollover (see docs/citation-freshness-ledger.md).

standards.name: NEC (NFPA 70)
standards.verification_note: NEC 2026 (NFPA 70-2026) published on the standard NFPA three-year cycle. Bundled ampacity/correction values still follow NEC 2023 (disclosed-lag per NEC_DISCLOSURE); the 2026 value refresh is a data change tracked separately.

standards.name: ASHRAE Standard 62.1
standards.verification_note: Verified, monitoring for the 2025 edition. ASHRAE 62.1 is on continuous maintenance; the bundled ventilation-rate values follow 62.1-2022 and the citation discloses it. Re-verify publication of 62.1-2025 each quarter and advance on confirmation.

standards.name: ASHRAE Standard 62.2
standards.verification_note: Verified, monitoring for the 2025 edition. Bundled values follow 62.2-2022; re-verify publication of 62.2-2025 each quarter and advance on confirmation.

standards.name: ASHRAE Standard 90.1
standards.verification_note: Verified, monitoring for the 2025 edition. Bundled values follow 90.1-2022; re-verify publication of 90.1-2025 each quarter and advance on confirmation.

standards.name: AASHTO Green Book (Policy on Geometric Design)
standards.verification_note: Verified, monitoring for the 8th edition. The bundled geometric-design defaults follow the 2018 7th edition and the citation discloses it; re-verify publication of the 8th edition each quarter and advance on confirmation.
